identity.name: NordicPrint
identity.description: A Swedish e-commerce experience that blends functional minimalism with the warmth of personal memories. White space is active, not passive.

primary.description: Warm Terracotta - evoking creativity, warmth, and brick (Swedish vernacular). Use for Primary CTAs.

secondary.description: Stone Grey - used for secondary buttons and subtle backgrounds.

accent.description: Soft Emerald - for success states and eco-friendly badges.

bento_grid.description: Use for category selection. Asymmetric grid to create visual interest.

product_page.layout: Split screen. Left side: Sticky Gallery/3D View (60%). Right side: Scrollable Details & Actions (40%).

editor_ui.toolbar: Floating glassmorphism panels on Left (Tools) and Right (Layers/Config).
editor_ui.bottom_bar: Zoom and Pagination controls centered at bottom.

visual_enhancers.gradients: None. Use flat colors or subtle noise textures.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-white rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-primary/90 transition-all shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl hover:scale-105
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-secondary/80 transition-all
buttons.outline: border-2 border-primary text-primary rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-medium hover:bg-primary/5 transition-all

cards.image_hover: group-hover:scale-105 transition-transform duration-500 ease-out object-cover w-full h-full

inputs.default: h-12 border-0 border-b border-slate-200 bg-transparent px-0 focus:ring-0 focus:border-primary placeholder:text-slate-300 transition-colors rounded-none

lighting.setup: Studio lighting. <Environment preset='city' /> with <ContactShadows /> for grounding.

hero.alt: Minimalist living room with large wall art

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALL_DEPENDENCIES: npm install three @react-three/fiber @react-three/drei react-dropzone use-gesture framer-motion
THEME_SETUP: Enforce 'Light Mode' by default. Do not use dark mode toggle unless necessary.
NAVBAR: Sticky, glassmorphism. Logo left, Nav center, Cart/Profile right.
HERO: Use large typography + the 'Wall Art' image. CTA: 'Designa nu' (Start Designing).
3D_EDITOR: Create a 'Scene' component using R3F. Allow texture projection on a simple mesh (Box for Canvas, Cylinder for Mug).
LANGUAGE: All visible text MUST be in Swedish (e.g., 'Lägg i varukorg', 'Ladda upp bild', 'Mina designer').
DATA_TESTID: Add data-testid to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, product cards) for testing.

universal_guidelines.accessibility: Ensure contrast ratios. Use aria-labels for icon-only buttons.
universal_guidelines.performance: Lazy load 3D models and heavy images.
